titleStmt.title: SII 19.389: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 389. (A.R. No. 183 of 1907.) UṞAIYŪR, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PAÑCHAVARṆĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is a damaged inscription probably assignable to the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa. It registers an endowment of 2 mā of land after bringing it under cultivation by Tāyaṉ Aṟiñjigai alias Tiruvuḍaitalai Ōṭṭuvaṭṭil Pichchi a Veḷḷāḷa lady residing at Uṟaiyūr, for the supply of water (from the river) for the sacred bath of god Tiruvuḍaittalai-Perumāḷ and for offerings of certain specified preparations on the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti every year, in the temple at Uṟaiyūr in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu patiṉ6
ṟāvatu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu Uṟaiyūr tiruvūṭaitalaipperumā
ḷukku Ivvūr veḷḷāṭṭi tāyaṉaṟiñcikaiyāṉa tiruvuṭaitalaiy Ō
ṭṭuvaṭṭilppicci Ittevar tevatāṉam kāmakarattu vaṭavāy
ciṟu tiṭalil cantrātittaval viḷaiccaṟiyāta nilam kalli vacak
kiṉa nilam ce
k kāṟcey meṟkku Ip
ṟu māvukku kiḻakkum nakaikkumā
Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ
tevar tevatānam cantrātittaval viḷaiñca
tirumukkuṭal tevar tevatā
Ittevar tevatānattukku kiḻakkum
nāṉkellaiyuḷ ḷakappaṭṭa nila
ṇṭu kiṭakkai nilamum Āy Iraṇṭumā Ivviraṇṭu māvil vanta pokam koṇṭu
Uttiramayaṉam paṟṟiṉa saṅgrān=ti kalacam koṇṭu cantrātitaval sna
haṉam ceytu patteṭṭukkuttal cūlanāḻiyāl patakkariciyum nariyparuppi
ṉ kummāyamum kaṟiamutum porikkaṟiamutum ney Āḻākkum tayiramutu nāḻi
yum koṇṭu Amutu ceyvitu Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 19.389 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
